modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need a new license key for Bluebeam due to installation limit.

full_description_text:  
I am trying to use Bluebeam, but I keep getting an error message. It says that the number of authorized installations for my license key has been exceeded. I think I need a new license key because I can't uninstall it from another computer.
short_description: Need a new license key for Bluebeam due to installation limit.
description: I am trying to use Bluebeam, but I keep getting an error message. It says that the number of authorized installations for my license key has been exceeded. I think I need a new license key because I can't uninstall it from another computer.
